title: glycosmis trifoliata
intro: Glycosmis trifoliata, also known as the three-leafed glycosmis or three-leafed spurge, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, commonly found in Southeast Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy, often used in traditional medicine, through various preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
